hero.badge: The Official Community for Vibe Coders
hero.subheadline: Build in public, get real feedback and accelerate your launches with the configurations the experts use.
hero.socialProof: {{countApps}} verified apps • {{countBuilders}} builders building • {{countSpots}} spots remaining

card1.title: Your portfolio sells.
card1.body: Showcase your apps, sell your consulting services, and let clients book a call directly with you. Your code closes the deals.
card1.subtitle: Tech Lead. Turning ideas into products.

card2.title: Real feedback.
card2.body: Get a Squad of testers who find your app's bugs before your customers do.

card3.title: Capture ideas. Manage Roadmaps.
card3.body: Log your random ideas so you don't lose them, and keep professional control of your launched apps' features with an organized Roadmap.

card4.title: Accelerate your build.
card4.body: Your shortcut to production. Copy the rules and prompts used by experts to build without friction and master Vibe Coding.

card5.title: Learn from others.
card5.body: Read the stories and lessons from other builders. Practical guides to ship better software.
card5.article1: How I launched my SaaS in 72 hours
card5.article3: From idea to MVP: my process

card6.title: Build your reputation.
card6.body: Accumulate real milestones. Earn 'Official Tester' or 'Verified App' badges that validate your expertise to the community and clients.

free.title: Builder
free.desc: Everything you need to validate your idea and connect with other builders.
free.f1: Validate your apps with community feedback
free.f3: Create your profile and showcase what you're building
free.f4: Ready to grow? Unlock Builder Pro for $19.90/year →

pro.title: Builder Pro
pro.desc: Focus on building. We take care of the rest.
pro.f2: Public Roadmap: don't waste a single update on your community
pro.f3: Centralized Feedback & Bugs: no need to build another backend
pro.f4: Real-time Banners: launch alerts without touching code
pro.f5: Sell your services: integrated 'Book a Call' button on your profile
pro.f6: Analytics for your Apps: visitors, views, countries and sources
pro.f7: Public Roadmap management with custom domain
pro.f8: Public Feedback page with your own domain
pro.f9: Open to Partnerships: connect with investors and partners
pro.f10: Multifounders: manage apps in teams with other co-founders
pro.f11: Waitlist: capture interested users before launching
pro.f12: App Marketplace: buy and sell your apps
pro.f13: Status Page: show your app status in real time
pro.f14: Change Logs: document every improvement of your product
pro.footer: Your price is frozen for life when you subscribe

freemium.title: Build in public. Validate with experts.
freemium.subtitle: Access to the community and testing tools is 100% free. Start today.
freemium.trustText: Instant access. No credit card required.
